name: Divine Smite
description: Immediately after you hit a target with a Melee weapon or an Unarmed Strike, you can expend one spell slot to smite the target. The smite deals 2d8 Radiant damage per spell slot level (base 2d8 at 1st, +1d8 per level). Undead and Fiends take an extra 1d8 Radiant damage.
mitigation_notes: Declared AFTER a melee hit, costs a spell slot. The engine alerts after a melee hit when divine_smite tag is present. DM sets the damage dice to match the slot level expended.
